title: dryopteris pseudocaenopteris
intro: Dryopteris pseudocaenopteris is a species of fern, specifically a type of wood fern, native to Asia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris pseudocaenopteris include potential relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in detoxification and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea, or used in tinctures and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
